# sakura_apprun_dedicated_lb_nodes (Data Source)

List of load balancer nodes in an AppRun dedicated load balancer

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sakura_apprun_dedicated_cluster" "main" {
  name = "ExampleCluster"
}

data "sakura_apprun_dedicated_auto_scaling_group" "main" {
  cluster_id = data.sakura_apprun_dedicated_cluster.main.id
  id         = "A5F8D577-7395-4EB4-83D9-AC60A1EF2C5B"
}

data "sakura_apprun_dedicated_lb" "main" {
  cluster_id            = data.sakura_apprun_dedicated_cluster.main.id
  auto_scaling_group_id = data.sakura_apprun_dedicated_auto_scaling_group.main.id
  name                  = "ExampleLB"
}

data "sakura_apprun_dedicated_lb_nodes" "main" {
  cluster_id            = data.sakura_apprun_dedicated_cluster.main.id
  auto_scaling_group_id = data.sakura_apprun_dedicated_auto_scaling_group.main.id
  lb_id      = data.sakura_apprun_dedicated_lb.main.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `auto_scaling_group_id` (String) The auto scaling group ID that the lb_nodes belongs to
- `cluster_id` (String) The cluster ID that the lb_nodes belongs to
- `lb_id` (String) The load balancer ID that the lb_nodes belong to

### Read-Only

- `nodes` (Attributes List) List of load balancer nodes (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--nodes))

<a id="nestedatt--nodes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `nodes`

Required:

- `id` (String) The load balancer node ID

Optional:

- `resource_id` (String) The ID of the lb_nodes.

Read-Only:

- `archive_version` (String) The archive version
- `create_error_message` (String) The error message if creation failed
- `created` (String) The creation time of the load balancer node
- `interfaces` (Attributes List) The network interfaces of the load balancer node (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--nodes--interfaces))
- `status` (String) The status of the load balancer node

<a id="nestedatt--nodes--interfaces"></a>
### Nested Schema for `nodes.interfaces`

Read-Only:

- `addresses` (Attributes Set) The IP addresses assigned to this interface (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--nodes--interfaces--addresses))
- `interface_index` (Number) The interface index

<a id="nestedatt--nodes--interfaces--addresses"></a>
### Nested Schema for `nodes.interfaces.addresses`

Read-Only:

- `address` (String) The IP address
- `vip` (Boolean) Whether this is a VIP address
